channel.title: NPR Topics: News
channel.description: NPR news, audio, and podcasts. Coverage of breaking stories, national and world news, politics, business, science, technology, and extended coverage of major national and world events.
channel.copyright: Copyright 2024 NPR - For Personal Use Only

item.title: Hantavirus countdown: U.S. cruise passengers settle in for 42 days of waiting
item.description: The hantavirus outbreak on a cruise ship has potentially exposed passengers to a deadly disease. Most returning Americans are now housed in Nebraska. Some may be cleared to quarantine at home.
item.content:encoded:
The hantavirus outbreak on a cruise ship has potentially exposed passengers to a deadly disease. Most returning Americans are now housed in Nebraska. Some may be cleared to quarantine at home. 

(Image credit: Dylan Widger)
item.dc:creator: Pien Huang

item.title: Shakira returns to official World Cup song duty, this time with Burna Boy
item.description: FIFA's official 2026 World Cup song is "Dai Dai" from Shakira and Burna Boy. There are a number of factors that shape which songs define a tournament — and endure beyond it.
item.content:encoded: FIFA's official 2026 World Cup song is "Dai Dai" from Shakira and Burna Boy. There are a number of factors that shape which songs define a tournament — and endure beyond it.
item.dc:creator: Rachel Treisman

item.title: The Trump administration is planning a prayer event on the National Mall. All but one of the speakers is Christian
item.description: The event comes as a new survey finds that many Americans aren't comfortable mixing religion and politics.
item.content:encoded:
The event comes as a new survey finds that many Americans aren't comfortable mixing religion and politics.

(Image credit: Alex Brandon)
item.dc:creator: Kathryn Post

item.title: Harvey Weinstein's third sex crimes trial in New York ends in mistrial
item.description: It was the second time in a year a jury was unable to reach a verdict on a rape charge brought by Jessica Mann.
item.content:encoded:
It was the second time in a year a jury was unable to reach a verdict on a rape charge brought by Jessica Mann.

(Image credit: Spencer Platt)
item.dc:creator: Chloee Weiner

item.title: Can the NFL's Rooney Rule survive the DEI backlash?
item.description: Florida's attorney general says the NFL's Rooney Rule, which requires teams to interview minority candidates for top jobs, is discriminatory. Trump's EEOC has challenged such policies elsewhere.
item.content:encoded:
Florida's attorney general says the NFL's Rooney Rule, which requires teams to interview minority candidates for top jobs, is discriminatory. Trump's EEOC has challenged such policies elsewhere.

(Image credit: Kevin C. Cox)
item.dc:creator: Andrea Hsu

item.title: SCOTUS upholds abortion pill telehealth access. And, Trump returns from China visit
item.description: The Supreme Court kept access to the abortion pill mifepristone available via telehealth. And, Trump says he made multiple trade deals during his state visit to China.
item.content:encoded:
The Supreme Court kept access to the abortion pill mifepristone available via telehealth. And, Trump says he made multiple trade deals during his state visit to China.

(Image credit: Natalie Behring)
item.dc:creator: Brittney Melton

item.title: Key takeaways from Trump's China trip
item.description: President Trump returns to the U.S. after wrapping up his whirlwind trip to China.
item.content:encoded:
President Trump returns to the U.S. after wrapping up his whirlwind trip to China.

(Image credit: Evan Vucci)
item.dc:creator: Tamara Keith

item.title: Death toll in attack on Kyiv apartment building now stands at 24
item.description: Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelenskyy said Friday that a Russian missile attack on a Kyiv apartment building the previous day killed 24 people, including three children.
item.content:encoded:
Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelenskyy said Friday that a Russian missile attack on a Kyiv apartment building the previous day killed 24 people, including three children.

(Image credit: Evgeniy Maloletka)
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press

item.title: Which Trump cabinet member has a new reality show? The quiz knows
item.description: This week, in Warshington, D.C., the Senate confirmed Kevin Warsh as the next chair of the Federal Reserve and we wrote a quiz question about his name. Enjoy that, and the other nine, too.
item.content:encoded: This week, in Warshington, D.C., the Senate confirmed Kevin Warsh as the next chair of the Federal Reserve and we wrote a quiz question about his name. Enjoy that, and the other nine, too.
item.dc:creator: Holly J. Morris

item.title: Gen Z homeowners? Yes, more in their 20s are managing to buy despite the odds
item.description: Gen Z homeowners now outpace millennials at the same age. They're more likely to be single and less likely to use help from parents.
item.content:encoded:
Gen Z homeowners now outpace millennials at the same age. They're more likely to be single and less likely to use help from parents.

(Image credit: Caleb Alvarado for NPR)
item.dc:creator: Jennifer Ludden
